title: Fix Google access denied page — replace Google with DuckDuckGo search backend

requirements.summary: Add iframe load error detection and fallback UI to InAppBrowser component for blocked content
acceptanceCriteria: If an iframe returns an access-denied or blocked response, the user sees a clear error message inside the InAppBrowser modal.
A visible 'Open in new tab' button is shown as a fallback whenever iframe content cannot be displayed.
The fallback is triggered automatically on iframe load error without requiring user action beyond clicking the button.

file_operations.description: Add iframe onError and onLoad event handlers to detect when content fails to load or is blocked by X-Frame-Options. Introduce a local state variable to track iframe load failures. When a load error is detected, render a user-friendly fallback message explaining that the content cannot be displayed inline, along with the existing 'Open in new tab' button prominently displayed as the primary action. Ensure the error state is reset when the URL changes. Keep the existing close button and loading spinner logic intact.
